en: Don't say these basic words. Upgrade them.
ko: 이 기본 단어들을 쓰지 마세요. 업그레이드하세요.

en: Say, schooling, learning, instruction, academic system.
ko: schooling, learning, instruction, academic system이라고 하세요.

en: Say, ecosystem, habitat, natural surroundings, biosphere.
ko: ecosystem, habitat, natural surroundings, biosphere라고 하세요.

en: Use these in writing and speaking.
Follow Daily Life English for more IELTS upgrades.
ko: 더 많은 IELTS 업그레이드를 위해 Daily Life English을 팔로우하세요.
